meta.summary: SOAPnuke integrated quality control and preprocessing for FASTQ, BAM, and CRAM sequencing data.
meta.description: SOAPnuke integrated quality control and preprocessing for FASTQ, BAM, and CRAM sequencing data.

test: SOAPnuke -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'SOAPnuke filter tools version 2.1.9' >/dev/null && soapnuke -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'SOAPnuke filter tools version 2.1.9' >/dev/null && SOAPnuke 2>&1 | grep -F 'Program: SOAPnuke' >/dev/null && SOAPnuke filter -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: filter' >/dev/null && SOAPnuke filtersRNA -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: filtersRNA' >/dev/null && SOAPnuke filterMeta -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: filterMeta' >/dev/null && SOAPnuke filterStLFR -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: filterStLFR' >/dev/null && SOAPnuke filterHts -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: filterHts' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v SOAPnuke) | grep -F 'libhts' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v SOAPnuke) | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-soapnuke-pe && cd /tmp/taf-soapnuke-pe && printf '@r1/1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r1.fq && printf '@r1/2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r2.fq && SOAPnuke filter -1 r1.fq -2 r2.fq -C clean_1.fq -D clean_2.fq -o out -T 1 -4 5 -l 5 -q 0.5 -n 0.5 && grep -F '@r1/1' out/clean_1.fq >/dev/null && grep -F '@r1/2' out/clean_2.fq >/dev/null && test -s out/Basic_Statistics_of_Sequencing_Quality.txt && test -s out/Statistics_of_Filtered_Reads.txt

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-soapnuke-mods && cd /tmp/taf-soapnuke-mods && printf '@s1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fq.gz && SOAPnuke filtersRNA -1 reads.fq.gz -C srna_clean.fq.gz -o srna -T 1 -4 5 -l 5 -q 0.5 -n 0.5 && test -s srna/srna_clean.fq.gz && test -s srna/Basic_Statistics_of_Sequencing_Quality.txt && SOAPnuke filterMeta -1 reads.fq -C meta_clean.fq -o meta -T 1 -4 5 -l 5 -q 0.5 -n 0.5 && grep -F '@s1' meta/meta_clean.fq >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-soapnuke-hts && cd /tmp/taf-soapnuke-hts && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:unknown
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:1000
r1	0	chr1	1	60	32M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > in.sam && samtools view -bS in.sam > in.bam && SOAPnuke filterHts -1 in.bam -2 clean.bam -o out -T 1 -4 5 -l 5 -q 0.5 -n 0.5 && test -s out/clean.bam && samtools view out/clean.bam | grep -F 'r1' >/dev/null

Rscript /opt/soapnuke/Rscripts/Q20Q30.R 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && Rscript /opt/soapnuke/Rscripts/base.R 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && Rscript /opt/soapnuke/Rscripts/quality.R 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && test -s /opt/soapnuke/share/doc/Readme.md && grep -F 'SOAPnuke is released under' /opt/soapnuke/share/doc/Readme.md >/dev/null
